rationale: The citing paper is a consumer-psychology experiment on identity-driven choice between donation vs. discount promotions, whereas the cited paper is a quantitative hierarchical-Bayes model of multibrand portfolio promotion carryover and exposure optimization. The notes show little construct/method overlap beyond the broad topic of “promotions,” and the match evidence is only a single DOI hit with no in-text citation context indicating theory, method, or benchmark use. This looks most consistent with an incidental/background mention rather than substantive dependence.
